response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies, but lacks the depth of AI/ML expertise and recognized leadership expected for a Principal Engineer role in AI strategy. Their entrepreneurial and open-source contributions show initiative, but the role requires more direct evidence of AI-driven product development and strategic influence at scale.
strengths: Diverse full-stack and infrastructure experience across multiple domains
Hands-on experience with cloud and AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML or equivalent demonstrated expertise
Limited evidence of AI-driven product leadership or strategic impact
Seniority below Director-level IC expectations (current title is Staff/Senior)
